data.body:
## Description

Create `plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-writer-output.md`. Documents the structured output interface between dso:red-test-writer (sonnet) and dso:red-test-evaluator (opus, Story eedc-c886).

Two output formats:
- Format 1 (success): TEST_RESULT:written with fields TEST_FILE, RED_ASSERTION, BEHAVIORAL_JUSTIFICATION
- Format 2 (failure): TEST_RESULT:rejected with fields REJECTION_REASON (enum: no_observable_behavior | requires_integration_env | ambiguous_spec | structural_only_possible), DESCRIPTION, SUGGESTED_ALTERNATIVE

All fields documented with types and required/optional status.

## File Impact
- CREATE: plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-writer-output.md

## TDD Requirement
test-exempt: no conditional logic, purely structural documentation. Exemption criterion 3 (modifies only static assets — Markdown documentation).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] `ruff format --check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Contract doc exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-writer-output.md
- [ ] Contains Signal Name section
  Verify: grep -q 'Signal Name' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-writer-output.md
- [ ] Contains both output formats (TEST_RESULT:written and TEST_RESULT:rejected)
  Verify: grep -q 'TEST_RESULT:written' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-writer-output.md && grep -q 'TEST_RESULT:rejected' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-writer-output.md
- [ ] Contains all rejection reason enum values
  Verify: grep -q 'no_observable_behavior' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-writer-output.md && grep -q 'structural_only_possible' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-writer-output.md
